Publication profile

An EMMO-aligned application ontology release profile for PEMFC concepts, measurements, curated vocabulary, and publication-ready provenance.

Single-page reference

Ontology Reference

A release-oriented reference for this ontology profile, with working publication downloads and a stable IRI contract documented for future namespace registration.

JSON-LD context

Versioned release

Versioned inferred

Editorial note

Curated release posture

The PEMFC release guarantees structural completeness, but generated definitions and retained local vocabulary terms should still be curated by domain experts before claiming full conceptual maturity.

  • The download links in this page target the generated publication tree directly, so they work before any `w3id` namespace registration.
  • The canonical IRI table still records the intended stable public contract for later redirect registration.
  • The schema, curated vocabulary, and examples remain published as separate modules by design.

Classes

LabelIRIStatusDefinitionSuperclassesMappings
Agent https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Agent Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Agent. http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Agent owl:equivalentClass -> Agent
Data https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Data Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Data. http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Entity owl:equivalentClass -> DataSet
Data Point https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DataPoint Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Data Point. http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Entity rdfs:subClassOf -> DataSet
Instrument https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Instrument Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Instrument. http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Entity rdfs:subClassOf -> ElectricPotentialMeasuringSystem
Manufacturing https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Manufacturing Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Manufacturing. https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Process None
Matter https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Matter Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Matter. None rdfs:subClassOf -> ElectrochemicalMaterial
Measurement https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Measurement Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Measurement. https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Process rdfs:subClassOf -> ElectrochemicalMeasurementProcess
Metadata https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Metadata Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Metadata. None rdfs:subClassOf -> Entity
Normalization Basis https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#NormalizationBasis Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Normalization Basis. None None
Parameter https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Parameter Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Parameter. None None
Process https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Process Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Process. http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Activity rdfs:subClassOf -> Procedure
Property https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Property Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Property. None rdfs:subClassOf -> Agent
Unit https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Unit Active A class in the H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology representing Unit. None None
